source.title: Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage - Pipe Laydown System Failure

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Walker Ridge Block 51

actions_taken: Job was stopped and area made secure
Camera to be installed for visual confirmation of proper grip
Manufacturer to address feedback of unintended movement via alarm
event.summary: On January 7, 2023, during drilling operations on the Transocean Deepwater Atlas drillship, a 6-5/8 inch drill pipe joint weighing 60.78 lbs/ft was dropped 58 feet onto the pipe skate when the Pipe Laydown System (PLS) failed to maintain grip. The PLS only engaged the roller jaw while the centralizer and gripper arms did not fully grip due to a hydraulic leak. The Assistant Driller could not visually confirm proper grip due to obstructed view and relied solely on the control screen which gave no indication of the partial grip or unintended movement. All personnel were in the safe step back area and no injuries occurred.
recommendations: Install camera for visual confirmation of proper grip on tubulars
Get confirmation of proper grip from Floorhands in safe step back area before proceeding
Manufacturer to address feedback of unintended movement of PLS via alarm on Assistant Driller's screen
key_phrases: centralizer and gripper arms did not fully grip

threats.name: Obstructed view of PLS grip point

consequences.name: Dropped object - drill pipe falls to drill floor
Potential personnel injury from falling object

controls.name: PLS hydraulic gripping system
controls.barrier_role: Prevent loss of grip on drill pipe
controls.lod_basis: Primary physical barrier to prevent dropped object

supporting_text: it successfully gripped the single joint but with only the roller jaw. The centralizer and gripper arms did not fully grip the pipe. This was due to an unknown leak in the hydraulics.
The PLS released the joint of drill pipe falling 58 feet onto the pipe skate.

controls.name: PLS control system feedback and indication
controls.barrier_role: Detect and alert operator of improper grip or unintended movement
controls.lod_basis: Detection and alarm system to verify barrier integrity

supporting_text: The control system gave no indication to the Assistant Driller of unintended movement from 90 degrees to 87.2 degrees.
The PLS gripper does not send a verification that the head is gripped around the tubular.
There is no alarm that will alert the Assistant Driller of any unintended movement of the PLS.

controls.name: Visual verification of PLS grip by Assistant Driller
controls.barrier_role: Human verification of proper grip before proceeding
controls.lod_basis: Independent verification by operator before critical operation

supporting_text: Due to the Assistant Driller's view being obstructed by a derrick beam, he was not able to confirm the proper grip but proceeded to lay down the single joint of drill pipe anyway.
The Assistant Driller utilized the screen on the Driller's chair to verify the PLS had closed all arms and was ready to pick up the drill pipe.

controls.name: Job by Design (JBD) procedure review
controls.barrier_role: Ensure crew understands safe work procedures
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to establish safe work practices

supporting_text: the drill crew, consisting of a Assistant Driller and (3) Floorhands, reviewed the Job by Design (JBD) and proceeded to lay out a single joint of 6.625" drill pipe

controls.name: Safe step back area / drop zone exclusion
controls.barrier_role: Protect personnel from dropped object consequences
controls.lod_basis: Mitigates consequence by ensuring personnel are clear of impact zone

supporting_text: All personnel were in the designated safe step back area, clear of the drop zone as per the JBD.

controls.name: Floorhand visual confirmation of grip (proposed)
controls.barrier_role: Independent verification of proper grip from unobstructed viewpoint

supporting_text: the contractor will install a camera for visual confirmation of the proper grip on tubulars and get confirmation of the proper grip from the Floorhands in safe step back area before proceeding

controls.name: Camera system for grip verification (proposed)
controls.barrier_role: Provide visual confirmation of proper grip when direct line of sight is obstructed
controls.lod_basis: Detection system to overcome visual obstruction

supporting_text: the contractor will install a camera for visual confirmation of the proper grip on tubulars

controls.name: PLS unintended movement alarm (proposed)
controls.barrier_role: Alert operator of PLS movement outside normal parameters
controls.lod_basis: Detection and alarm for abnormal equipment behavior

supporting_text: The manufacturer will address feedback of unintended movement of the PLS via alarm on the Assistant Drillers screen on the Driller's chair.

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
